ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "libref" INTEGER /* Reference number (LibRef) for the component */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment or note about the component */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "designator" TEXT /* Designator (e.g., C4, C6) for the component on the PCB */,
  "footprint" TEXT /* Footprint (e.g., CAPC2012M) of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in a project */,
  "populate" TEXT /* Populate status (e.g., None, Populated) of the component */,
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component type */,
  "designator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the designator */,
  "footprint_id" INTEGER /* ID of the footprint */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number from the manufacturer */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the component was added to the system */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the component was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_footprint_id FOREIGN KEY ("footprint_id") REFERENCES footprints ("footprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_designator_id FOREIGN KEY ("designator_id") REFERENCES designators ("designator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_component_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_type_id") REFERENCES component_types ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., In Progress, Completed) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_components" (
  "project_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-component association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the project */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the component was added to the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the project-component association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_components_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_types" (
  "component_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component type */,
  "component_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the component type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designators" (
  "designator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designator */,
  "designator_name" TEXT /* Name of the designator */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the designator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "footprints" (
  "footprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each footprint */,
  "footprint_name" TEXT /* Name of the footprint */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the footprint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("footprint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Engineer, Production Staff, Administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_history" (
  "component_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component history entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_history_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the component in inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Quantity at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last checked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Received) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed with the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
